title: Spicy Chinese Baked Tomatoes
description: A simple and flavorful Chinese-inspired dish featuring baked tomatoes with a spicy kick.
instructions: Cut the tops off the tomatoes and scoop out some of the insides.
Mix the sriracha sauce and olive oil in a small bowl.
Brush the sriracha mixture onto the tomatoes.
Place the tomatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the tomatoes are tender.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
